text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 
82 
STROKE_TIA 
LABEL: 
Stroke / Transient Ischemic Attack End-of-Year Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Condition Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
stroke / transient ischemic attack (TIA) as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: STRKETIA 
LONG NAME: STROKE_TIA 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived)
